pages.title: Example Plumbing Services
pages.text: Example Plumbing Services Ltd, your local plumber and heating engineer. We fix boilers, unblock drains, and install central heating across the local area. Registered with Companies House, company number 09876543. Registered office: 12 High Street, Sometown, SM1 2AB, England. Emergency plumber call-out available.

pages.title: Our Services
pages.text: Boiler repair, drain unblocking, central heating installation, emergency plumbing call-outs.

corpus.footerText: Example Plumbing Services Ltd, registered in England and Wales with Companies House, company number 09876543. Registered office: 12 High Street, Sometown, SM1 2AB, England.
